name: New BITS Job Created Via Bitsadmin
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: New BITS Job Created Via Bitsadmin
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a new bits job by Bitsadmin

False positives:
- Many legitimate applications or scripts could leverage "bitsadmin". This event is best correlated with EID 16403 via the JobID field

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\bitsadmin.exe%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New BITS Job Created Via Bitsadmin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\bitsadmin.exe%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New BITS Job Created Via Bitsadmin
